description: For those who love ultra cool moves, this Rakuni Move shoes from adidas is a fabulous buy. With a sleek silhouette and clean design, it's a great shoe for those who love those long drives and stylish clothing.UpperSynthetic leather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the mid-footLacing system for a snug, customised FitLightly padded collar and tongue for breathable comfort and optimum fitPadded foot-bed for all-day comfortMid-soleMoulded mid-sole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOut-soleTPR out-sole with flex grooves, textured and adiWEAR with Torsion system for absolute durability and gripShoe careWipe surface using a dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
